seoTitle: Dudley West vs Duncan — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Dudley West and Duncan. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Dudley West vs Duncan: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Dudley West and Duncan.
heading: Dudley West vs Duncan — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dudley West, South Australia and Duncan, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dudley West has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Duncan (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dudley West or Duncan safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dudley West has a flood risk score of 36/100, while Duncan scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dudley West scores 49/100 for bushfire risk. Duncan scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dudley West or Duncan?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dudley West has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.28% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
